description:
Advanced source code and text file printing.

WinPrint is a modern source code and text printing app with a cross-platform terminal UI and Windows/macOS GUI.
What's Changed
- Back-merge v3.0.12 into develop by @tig in #230
- fix(tui): bump Terminal.Gui to 2.4.17 — fixes File dialog crash on Linux (#5544) by @tig in #231
